body:
:

partner who wraps their arms around my waist and rocks side to side and stares at me like i’m the greatest thing. partner who kisses my neck to show affection instead of want, but who grips my hips to remind me that they’d bend me over anywhere i wanted. partner who is patient and soft and loving. who lets me help. who needs tending to. :(
